notes: The response is almost entirely solution-framed (a project plan with timelines and features) rather than a discovery artefact; it never surfaces the undisclosed FMA disparity as a go-live blocker, treats CCCFA and Centrix DSA uncertainties as manageable to-dos rather than genuine blockers, names no personas with cost context, and provides no baseline/target success metrics anchored to the 3–5 day decision-time problem.
